description:
Choose a license (MIT is the Elixir-ecosystem convention; user decision) and add:
- `LICENSE` file at repo root.
- `licenses: ["MIT"]` (or chosen) inside the `package:` block (B1).

hex.pm requires a declared license and expects the file to exist; without it adopters cannot legally use the package.

Acceptance: LICENSE present at root; `licenses:` populated; `mix hex.build` shows the license.
title: Add LICENSE file + licenses key
